hero.headline: TWO MINUTES UNDER THE TONGUE. STRAIGHT INTO THE BLOODSTREAM.
hero.subheadline: Pine pollen tincture from two South Island New Zealand forests. Bioactivity validated by University of Otago research. Trusted by 25,000+ New Zealand men.

trust.label: Bioactivity support in Otago lab research*

provenance.headline: From the forests New Zealand men trust.
provenance.body: Bio Gold pine pollen is sourced from two South Island New Zealand locations. One harvest per year. Our hydroethanolic extract preserves over 200 bioactive compounds. Sublingual delivery bypasses gut absorption and gets the bioactives straight into the bloodstream.

stats.label: Bioactivity observed in University of Otago in vitro research
Government-funded R&D before going to market
Sublingual hold time for full absorption

mechanism.label: The Science
mechanism.headline: Most supplements never reach your cells.
mechanism.subheadline: Gut absorption destroys up to 90% of most supplements before they reach the bloodstream. Bio Gold uses sublingual delivery. Hold under the tongue for 2 minutes. The bioactives bypass the gut and enter the bloodstream directly.
mechanism.footnote: *Based on University of Otago in vitro laboratory research into pine pollen bioactivity. Results observed in cell cultures, not a clinical claim.

steps.title: Harvested Once a Year
steps.body: Pine pollen is collected from two pristine South Island New Zealand locations during a narrow harvest window. One chance per year. No compromise.

steps.title: Hydroethanolic Extraction
steps.body: A water-alcohol extraction process pulls both water-soluble and fat-soluble bioactive compounds from the pollen grain. Over 200 compounds preserved.

steps.title: Sublingual Absorption
steps.body: Hold under the tongue for 2 minutes. Absorbed directly into the bloodstream via the sublingual mucosa. Bypasses the gut entirely. Maximum bioavailability.

products_section.headline: The Bio Gold Range
products_section.subheadline: Three products. One source. The most bioactive pine pollen on the planet.

provenance_section.label: New Zealand Provenance
provenance_section.headline: One forest. One harvest. One product.
provenance_section.body: Bio Gold pine pollen is harvested from two South Island New Zealand locations. The forests are clean, the process is traceable, and the harvest happens once a year during a narrow window. This isn't a commodity. It's a precision botanical.

research.headline: China Pine Pollen Market: Analysis
research.subheadline: A look at the current Chinese pine pollen market, the gaps in it, and the specific positions Bio Gold can own.

market_stats.label: Chinese consumers trust imported NZ health products
Premium NZ pine pollen brands in China today
Fast-track entry. No Blue Hat registration needed.

research.gaps_sub: Five structural gaps in the Chinese pine pollen market. Each one is a position Bio Gold can own outright.

gaps.title: Scientific Validation
gaps.body: No Chinese pine pollen brand cites independent peer-reviewed research. Bio Gold holds University of Otago in vitro research validation — independent scientific backing no domestic brand can match or replicate.

gaps.title: Delivery Mechanism
gaps.body: Chinese competitor products rely on capsule formats — gut absorption only, with no bioavailability advantage. Bio Gold's sublingual liquid delivers directly into the bloodstream in 2 minutes, bypassing the gut entirely.
gaps.advantage: Bio Gold advantage: Structural product superiority

gaps.title: NZ Provenance
gaps.body: Chinese consumers consistently rank imported supplements above domestic alternatives. New Zealand benefits from a clean, scientifically credible country image. No other NZ pine pollen brand is in the market.

gaps.title: Premium Brand Identity
gaps.body: The category currently has no premium visual identity. Packaging is functional at best. Bio Gold's design language, gold, charcoal, Outfit Bold, stands out immediately at point of consideration.

gaps.title: Bioavailability Story
gaps.body: No competitor addresses bioavailability explicitly. Bio Gold's hydroethanolic extraction plus sublingual delivery is a complete, defensible science story. Chinese consumers are increasingly sophisticated and ready to engage with it.

research.angles_label: How Bio Gold should be positioned

angles.body: Bridge traditional and modern. Pine pollen has been used in Chinese medicine for over 2,000 years. Bio Gold is the science-validated version. That story lands with Chinese consumers who trust both tradition and research.

angles.angle: "The pine pollen that doesn't wait for digestion."
angles.body: Lead with mechanism. Sublingual delivery is a genuinely superior bioavailability story. Simple, specific, defensible. No Chinese competitor can claim this without reformulating.

angles.angle: "Harvested once. From one place. By one company."
angles.body: Scarcity and provenance. One harvest window per year, two South Island locations. The opposite of commodity. Positions Bio Gold as a precision botanical, not a supplement.

angles.angle: "What traditional Chinese medicine has known for centuries, now harvested in New Zealand."
angles.body: Let the respect flow the right way. Pine pollen has 2,000 years in Chinese medicine. Bio Gold isn't redefining it — it's the highest-quality, science-validated version of something China already trusts, grown in New Zealand's clean South Island forests.

research.distribution_sub: Bio Gold can enter China via CBEC (cross-border e-commerce) immediately. No NMPA registration required for the initial phase.

distribution.note: Highest trust with Chinese health supplement consumers. No Blue Hat registration required via CBEC.
Strong for premium and scientific positioning. Tech-forward consumer base.
Health, beauty, and wellness credibility. Strong for organic discovery and KOL seeding.
Content-driven. Product demonstration format suits the sublingual mechanism story well.
